chain.thought: Explanation: Jeanette W. Hyde served as ambassador until January 31, 1998. The next ambassador extraordinary and plenipotentiary listed after her is E. William Crotty, who presented credentials on January 30, 1999.

judge_thought: Explanation: Jeanette W. Hyde served as ambassador until January 31, 1998. The next person listed with the title "ambassador extraordinary and plenipotentiary" after her is E. William Crotty (appointed January 30, 1999). Although chargés d'affaires served in between, the next ambassador was Crotty.
